stages.concept:
# Unit 056: 조동사 must - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **조동사 must**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> You **must** wear a seatbelt.
> 너는 안전벨트를 매야 한다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **must**는 두 가지 의미로 쓰여요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **의무** — ~해야 한다

> You **must** finish your homework.
> 너는 숙제를 끝내야 한다.

> Students **must** follow the school rules.
> 학생들은 학교 규칙을 따라야 한다.

**Q. 다음 문장에서 must의 의미로 알맞은 것을 고르세요.**
"She must be tired. She worked all day."
1. ~해야 한다 (의무)
2. ~임에 틀림없다 (강한 추측) ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: **강한 추측** — ~임에 틀림없다

> She **must** be tired. She worked all day.
> 그녀는 피곤함에 틀림없다. 하루 종일 일했거든.

> He **must** be a doctor. He's wearing a white coat.
> 그는 의사임에 틀림없다. 흰 가운을 입고 있거든.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **must not (mustn't)** — ~해서는 안 된다 (금지)

> You **must not** run in the hallway.
> 복도에서 뛰어서는 안 된다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: must와 비슷한 표현으로 **have to**가 있어요.

> I **have to** go now. = I **must** go now.
> 나는 지금 가야 한다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: must는 의무(~해야)와 강한 추측(~틀림없다)! must not은 금지이고, have to로 바꿔 쓸 수 있군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 056: 조동사 must - 연습문제 A

**01.** 우리 말에 맞게 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
우리는 이 시험을 봐야 한다.
We take this exam.
> **정답** must

---

**02.** 너는 규칙을 따라야 한다.
You follow the rules.
> **정답** must

---

**03.** 그녀는 매우 피곤한 게 틀림없다.
She be very tired.
> **정답** must

---

**04.** 학생들은 교실에서 조용히 해야 한다.
Students be quiet in the classroom.
> **정답** must

---

**05.** 그는 부자인 게 틀림없다.
He be rich.
> **정답** must

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
You must follows the school rules.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** follows → follow

---

**07.** She musts finish her homework.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** musts → must

---

**08.** They must not runs in the hallway.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** runs → run

---

**09.** He must to study hard.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to study → study

---

**10.** We must are careful on the road.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** are → be

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
너는 진실을 말해야 한다.
You tell the truth.
> **정답** must

---

**12.** 그녀는 바쁜 게 틀림없다.
She be busy.
> **정답** must

---

**13.** 너는 여기서 뛰면 안 된다.
You run here.
> **정답** must not (mustn't)

---

**14.** 그는 배가 고픈 게 틀림없다.
He be hungry.
> **정답** must

---

**15.** 학생들은 교복을 입어야 한다.
Students wear uniforms.
> **정답** must

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
너는 시간을 지켜야 한다.
must be You on time
> **정답** You / must / be / on / time

---

**17.** 그녀는 아픈 게 틀림없다.
must She sick be
> **정답** She / must / be / sick

---

**18.** 너는 도서관에서 떠들면 안 된다.
must You not talk in the library
> **정답** You / must / not / talk / in / the / library

---

**19.** 우리는 환경을 보호해야 한다.
protect must We the environment
> **정답** We / must / protect / the / environment

---

**20.** 그는 매우 똑똑한 게 틀림없다.
must very He smart be
> **정답** He / must / be / very / smart
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 056: 조동사 must - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 그림을 보고 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
![그림](public/images/units/004_desc_01.webp)
You __________ speak loudly in the library.
may not
must not
have to
can not
> **정답** must not

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
He doesn't look well. He must be sick.
What a mess! You must clean your room.
She is angry. You must apologize to her.
You must study quietly in the library.
> **정답** He doesn't look well. He must be sick.

---

**03.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
They must have breakfast in the morning.
may
will
have to
can
> **정답** have to

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
You __________ make a noise at night.
You __________ make the room dirty.
may not
can not
must not
don't have to
> **정답** must not

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
You have to cross the street on green light.
will
must
may
can
> **정답** must

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You don't have to cook dinner tonight.
Do I have to finish this work?
He must tell the truth.
I have to cleaning my room today.
> **정답** I have to cleaning my room today.

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 책은 무료입니다. 당신은 돈을 낼 필요가 없습니다.
This book is free. You must not pay for it.
This book is free. You don't have to pay for it.
This book is free. You have not to pay for it.
This book is free. You cannot pay for it.
> **정답** This book is free. You don't have to pay for it.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You have to read many books.
It's late. You have to hurry.
She has to exercising regularly.
They have to help us.
> **정답** She has to exercising regularly.

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분을 부정문으로 바꿀 때 금지의
표현으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
You must fight other people.
don't need to
must not
have not to
don't have to
> **정답** must not

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
밖이 정말 추울 거예요.
It must not be really cold outside.
It must be really cold outside.
It cannot be really cold outside.
It has to be really cold outside.
> **정답** It must be really cold outside.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Do I have to finish this work by this afternoon?
B: No, you __________.
don't have to
may not
can not
must not
> **정답** don't have to

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
He must cares for children.
You have to follow school rules.
We must remember our PIN number.
She have to water the plant.
> **정답** We must remember our PIN number., You have to
follow school rules.

---

**13.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
수업 시간에 핸드폰을 사용해서는 안 된다.
You don't have to use
your cell phone during class.
> **정답** must not (mustn't), use

---

**14.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 너에게 화가 난 것이 틀림없다.
She have to be angry at you.
She must be angry at you.
She can be angry at you.
She may be angry at you.
> **정답** She must be angry at you.

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
We must not take pictures here.
She don't have to attend this class.
You don't must ride a bicycle here.
He must writes the letter.
> **정답** We must not take pictures here.

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개)
I have an English test tomorrow. Last time, I
get a low grade. My friend received an
A. He don't have to worry
about the test. But, I have to study
hard.
> **정답** have, got, received, doesn't have to, have to

---

**17.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
Amy must finish her homework.
Amy __________ finish her homework.
may
can
will
has to
> **정답** has to

---

**18.** 문맥상 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
You (     ) say bad things to other people.
> **정답** must not

---

**19.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
My mom don't have to wash
the dishes right now.
> **정답** doesn't have to, wash

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
He must wears this uniform at
school.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wears → wear
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 056 조동사 must중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 잠들기 전 양치질을 해야 한다. [brush, your teeth]
You  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  before you go to
bed.
정답 must, brush, your, teeth

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
너는 이 책을 반납해야 한다. [return, this book]
You  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 have, to, return, this, book

---

**03.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) go to
A: Why don't we play the computer game?
B: I'm sorry. I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  an art
academy now.
• art academy 미술학원
정답 have, to, go, to

---

**04.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) not, eat
A: Would you like to try some?
B: I'll see a doctor tomorrow. I  (     )   (     )  
anything today.
정답 must, not, eat

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) have to
A: Do I have to move this stuff by myself?
B: No, you  (     )   (     )   (     ) . I'll help you with
that.
• stuff 물건
정답 don't, have, to

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Jason은 어제 집에 일찍 가야 했다. [go home]
Jason  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  early yesterday.
정답 had, to, go, home

---

**07.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오. (조동사 must/must not 사용할 것)
There are some traffic rules that we must follow. First,
You [wear] (     )  your seat belt. Second, you
[stop] (     )  at a red traffic light. Lastly, when
you are on the road, you [use] (     )  your
mobile phone.
정답 must wear, must stop, must not use

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Seojin은 기말시험을 위해 열심히 공부해야만 한다.
[study hard]
Seojin  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  for the final
exam.
정답 has, to, study, hard

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Dohan은 전화를 받지 않는다. 그는 바쁜 것이 틀림없다.
힌트 (     ) not, answer, be busy
Dohan  (     )   (     )  the phone. He  (     )  
.
정답 doesn't, answer, must, be, busy

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) must, have to
A: There are a lot of works to do.  (     )  I do these
things, too?
B: No, you  (     )   (     )   (     )  do.
정답 Must, don't, have, to

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 056: 조동사 must - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 그림을 보고 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
You __________ run in the hallway.
may not must not have to can not ![그림](public/images/units/009_desc_01.webp)
> 정답: must not

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
She doesn't look well.
She must be tired.
What a mess!
You must clean your desk.
He is angry.
You must apologize to him.
You must study quietly in the classroom.
> 정답: She doesn't look well. She must be tired.

---

**03.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
They must have lunch on time. may will have to can
> 정답: have to

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
You __________ make a noise in class.
You __________ make the hallway dirty. may not can not must not don't have to
> 정답: must not

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분과 바꿔 쓸 수 있는 말을 고르시오.
You have to cross the street on green light. will must may can
> 정답: must

---

**06.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You don't have to cook lunch today.
Do I have to finish this task?
He must tell the truth.
I  have to cleaning my room today.
> 정답: I have to cleaning my room today.

---

**07.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이 연필은 공짜입니다. 당신은 돈을 낼 필요가 없습니다.
This pencil is free.
You must not pay for it.
This pencil is free.
You don't have to pay for it.
This pencil is free.
You have not to pay for it.
This pencil is free.
You cannot pay for it.
> 정답: This pencil is free. You don't have to pay for it.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You have to read many books.
It's late.
You have to hurry.
She has to exercising every day.
They have to help us.
> 정답: She has to exercising every day.

---

**09.** 다음 중 밑줄 친 부분을 부정문으로 바꿀 때 금지의 표현으로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
You must hit other people. don't need to must not have not to don't have to
> 정답: must not

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
밖이 정말 더울 거예요.
It must not be really hot outside.
It must be really hot outside.
It cannot be really hot outside.
It has to be really hot outside.
> 정답: It must be really hot outside.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
A: Do I have to finish this task by this evening?
B: No, you __________. don't have to may not can not must not
> 정답: don't have to

---

**12.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) He must cares for the puppy.
You have to follow classroom rules.
We must remember our locker number.
She have to water the flowers.
> 정답: We must remember our locker number., You have to

---

**13.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
수업 시간에 간식을 먹어서는 안 된다.
You don't have to eat snacks during class.
> 정답: must not (mustn't), eat

---

**14.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 너에게 화가 난 것이 틀림없다.
He have to be angry at you.
He must be angry at you.
He can be angry at you.
He may be angry at you.
> 정답: He must be angry at you.

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
We must not take videos here.
She don't have to attend this meeting.
You don't must ride a scooter here.
He must writes the email.
> 정답: We must not take videos here.

---

**16.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
(2개) I have a math test tomorrow.
Last time, I get a low score.
My friend got an A.
He don't have to worry about the test.
But, I have to study hard.
> 정답: have, got, got, doesn't have to, have to

---

**17.** 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy must finish her project.
Amy __________ finish her project. may can will has to
> 정답: has to

---

**18.** 문맥상 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
You ? say mean things to other students.
> 정답: must not

---

**19.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
My dad don't have to wash the car right now.
> 정답: doesn't have to, wash

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서
틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. He  must  wears  the  helmet  at the  skating  rink. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: wears → wear
